chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2809 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as office objections have not been complied with by the learned Counsel for petitioner. 10.01.2018. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing but neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 22.12.2015. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 09.11.2015, since then nobody is pursuing this petition diligently. Therefore, it appears that the petitioner has no interest in this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
